files.patch:
@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ permissions:
   pull-requests: write
 
 concurrency:
-  group: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '37 * * * *')) && 'clawsweeper-apply' || ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.hot_intake == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '*/5 * * * *')) && 'clawsweeper-intake' || 'clawsweeper-review' }}
+  group: ${{ (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true' && github.event.inputs.apply_sync_comments_only == 'true') && 'clawsweeper-comment-sync' || ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '37 * * * *')) && 'clawsweeper-apply' || ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.hot_intake == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '*/5 * * * *')) && 'clawsweeper-intake' || 'clawsweeper-review' }}
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:

@@ -31,6 +31,8 @@ checkpoint, and status-only commits are intentionally omitted.
   or pull requests, fanning out single-item review shards.
 - Added targeted comment-sync mode so hot-intake reviews can publish durable
   Codex review comments immediately without closing items.
+- Separated targeted comment-sync workflow concurrency from bulk apply so hot
+  comment runs are not displaced by apply continuation backlog.
 
 ### Changed
